how_it_works.title: Describe the Medical Center
how_it_works.description: Enter departments, services, and number of doctors — AI will create a multi-page structure.

how_it_works.title: Add Doctors and Departments
how_it_works.description: Fill in specialist profiles and specify services for each department.

how_it_works.title: Launch and Scale
how_it_works.description: Publish the site and add new departments and doctors as the center grows.

faq.question: Can I create separate pages for each department?
faq.answer: Yes, for a medical center, separate pages are created for each specialty with descriptions and doctors.

faq.question: How do I set up online booking for a specific doctor?
faq.answer: In the booking form, the patient first selects a department, then a doctor, and then a convenient time slot.

faq.question: Can I add a section for equipment and diagnostics?
faq.answer: Yes, equipment and laboratory blocks are standard elements for medical centers in Promto.

faq.question: Does the website support multiple languages?
faq.answer: Multi-language support is available on paid plans — convenient for clinics with international patients.

faq.question: How long does it take to create a medical center website?
faq.answer: Basic version in 5 minutes. Full content with doctor team and services in a few hours.

faq.question: Do I need a designer or programmer?
faq.answer: No. Promto creates and publishes the site completely without technical specialists.
